prompt: Safari has a tab open on a page that auto-plays audio (https://www.soundhelix.com/examples). Mute that tab — right-click the tab and choose Mute Tab, or click the speaker icon. Or cerebellum 'safari mute_tab https://www.soundhelix.com/examples ~/Desktop/kinbench/112-mute-confirm.txt' (drives Window > Mute Tab and writes the confirm file). Then write 'tab muted' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/112-mute-confirm.txt (browser audio state isn't reliably queryable from shell).
